name: golf simulator guys
address: 8485 W Washington St Suite 11, Indianapolis, IN 46231
about: Golf Simulator Guys is a retail establishment specializing in golf simulator equipment and packages. They offer a comprehensive range of products from leading brands such as ProTee, SkyTrak, Uneekor, Foresight, and Trugolf, catering to both home and commercial use. Their inventory includes launch monitors, simulator software, hitting mats, projector enclosures, and multi-sport equipment. Pricing for their systems varies significantly, with entry-level options starting around $5,000 and high-end studio packages reaching up to $17,575. The venue is best suited for individuals and businesses looking to purchase a golf simulator, offering detailed product information and package deals to help customers find the right solution for their needs and budget.
why_golfers_like_it: Wide selection of top-tier launch monitor brands and simulator packages
Offers complete solutions combining hardware and software for a seamless setup
Variety of price points to suit different budgets and experience levels

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitor known for balancing high tech with simplicity
Improved camera system for accurate and reliable ball-tracking data
Overhead type, hi-speed camera-based launch monitor with VIEW software
Overhead type, hi-speed camera-based launch monitor with Ignite software
Premium launch monitor, industry benchmark in performance

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: As a retail fitting center, you would need to bring your own clubs if you are visiting to test equipment or receive a fitting.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue does not mention any food or drink service, so outside consumption policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes depends on the specific simulator package and software used, which varies with the products sold.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information indicating whether the venue is tailored for or suitable for children.
